reasoning: VIX at 22.74 (HIGH regime) and rising +1.29% overnight signals building fear. FOMC decision at 14:00 ET creates hard no-trade window 13:30-15:00 ET. Overnight gap +$3.47 suggests initial bullish sentiment, but elevated VIX + rising direction contradicts it — macro backdrop is risk-off ahead of the event. Technical ribbon is BULL-stacked but macro momentum is bearish. Entries window opens at 09:35 ET with caution; all activity halts 13:30-15:00 ET for FOMC.
